elements.text: You have an internship in a company that you really admire. To eventually receive the position you want, you know that you will have to work very hard for several months and the outcome is uncertain. As you envision your likely position in the company down the road,  you expect the position you want will be awarded to...

elements.name: working_to_get_ahead--academics_work_career_development--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
